description.simple_cn: Basic Memory 是一个知识管理系统，它允许您根据与 AI 助手的对话构建持久的语义图谱, 并通过自然语言查询来检索相关信息
description.simple_en: Basic Memory is a knowledge management system that allows you to build a persistent semantic graph based on the conversations with an AI assistant, and retrieve relevant information through natural language queries.

description.simple_cn: 该服务器使用 Tavily API 根据指定的查询执行搜索
description.simple_en: This server uses the Tavily API to execute searches based on the specified query

description.simple_cn: 该服务可以通过CoRobot控制机器人执行策略任务，支持启动/停止任务、设置提示词、配置策略服务器等功能
description.simple_en: This service can control robot policy tasks through CoRobot, supporting start/stop tasks, set prompts, configure policy servers, etc.

description.simple_cn: 数据分析服务，提供LeRobot数据集的t-SNE降维可视化分析功能，支持状态、动作和图像特征的分析
description.simple_en: Data analysis service providing t-SNE dimensionality reduction visualization for LeRobot datasets, supporting analysis of state, action, and image features
